title: Naan Sonnadhum lyrics Mayakkam Enna Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Naresh Iyer, Saindhavi
Song: Naan Sonnadhum
Lyrics : Selvaraghavan

Naan sonnadhum mazha vandhuchaa
naan sollala veyil vandhucha
Adi rendume idham thandhucha
muthu muthu pechi..

En kannula poi irukka, un kannoda mai kirukka
Adi kalliye arivirukka, en moochu ninnu pochu

Kkaathodu kaathaaga ulla vandhiya
kaatoda kaadaaga katti potiya
oothaadha oothellaam ulla oothudhu
en pechellam ninnu poi moola suthuthu (Nan sonnadhum ...)

Karuvaatu kolambaa neeyum rusi yethura
oruvaati thinnu paakka usupethura
Adi podi podi podi potta mayile
olai yedhum vandhucha
Unna thooki poga dhaan varuven ninnu
Kili vandhu padhil sollucha

Karu naakku kaara pulla
karupatti nerathu mulla
eduvatta nanapu tholla,Nee kalavaani
oh Karuvaatu kolambaa neeyum rusi yethura
oruvaati thinnu paakka usupethura. (Naan sonnadhum...)

Aathaadi aadu meika raasa vandharaam
Enga aadu thinna echhi pulla meiya vandharaam

Adi podi podi podi mutta kanni
kattam katti paanja
Ada kanna moodi konjam saanja podhum
kanavula thee midhichen

kannaadi valayal thaaren
Kaadhuku jimiki thaaren
kaluthuku thaali thaaren
Ne varayaa-di
Kkaruvaatu kolambaa neeyum rusi yethura

Naan sonnadhum mazha vandhuchaa
naan sollala veyil vandhucha
Adi rendume idham thandhucha
muthu muthu pechi..

En kannula poi irukka, un kannoda mai kirukka
Adi kalliye arivirukka, en moochu ninnu pochu

Kkaathodu kaathaaga ulla vandhiya
kaatoda kaadaaga katti potiya
oothaadha oothellaam ulla oothudhu
en pechellam ninnu poi moola suthuthu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Naan Sonnadhum'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Mayakkam Enna'?

In the movie, the song highlights the protagonist's feelings of love and heartbreak, adding depth to the storyline.

Who are the singers of 'Naan Sonnadhum'?

The song features the talented voices of Naresh Iyer and Saindhavi.

Who composed the music for 'Naan Sonnadhum'?

The music was composed by GV Prakash, known for his unique sound and style.

When was 'Naan Sonnadhum' released?

The song was released on September 20, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Sonnadhum, the characters navigate the tumultuous waters of love and longing, making it a poignant addition to the soundtrack of Mayakkam Enna. The song's lyrics, penned by Selvaraghavan, evoke a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth. With its melodic composition by GV Prakash, the duet captures the essence of romantic yearning. This heartfelt track resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Sonnadhum from the movie Mayakkam Enna beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Naresh Iyer and Saindhavi, this duet resonates with deep emotions that linger in the heart. The collaboration of Selvaraghavan's poignant lyrics and GV Prakash's soulful composition makes this song a must-listen for anyone who cherishes romantic melodies.
stanzaMeanings: What I said has come true, the rain has arrived. I didn't say the sun has come, both have given me this feeling, like pearls of joy.
There is a lie in my eyes, your eyes are deceiving. That is the truth, my breath has gone away.
With the wind, the breeze has come inside, like a storm. Everything is blown away, my friend, you have gone and taken everything.
The playful one, you too are like a sweet fruit. When I look at you, I feel dizzy. The tiny, tiny, tiny clouds have come. I will come to take you away, the bird has come to give a message.
The black one, the dark flower, whatever it is, I will remove it. You are the one who has stolen my heart. The playful one, you too are like a sweet fruit.
The playful one, you too are like a sweet fruit. When I look at you, I feel dizzy. The tiny, tiny, tiny clouds have come. I will come to take you away, the bird has come to give a message.
There is a lie in my eyes, your eyes are deceiving. That is the truth, my breath has gone away.
With the wind, the breeze has come inside, like a storm. Everything is blown away, my friend, you have gone and taken everything.
